tasks.description: Remove set_task_graph from StateStore trait, make it inherent on JsonStateStore, store computed successor map on Workflow, expose via successor_map()

Change task_successors field from HashMap to Option<HashMap> in JsonStateStore; None = pre-graph state file, Some(empty) = graph with no edges; update getter, setter, constructor, and cmd_retry fallback

Introduce pub struct TaskSuccessors(HashMap<String, Vec<String>>) with get() and is_empty(); use it in JsonStateStore field/getter/setter, Workflow computed_successors/successor_map(), and downstream_tasks in CLI
Add BFS unit tests for downstream_tasks: linear chain, diamond, missing start, empty start, multiple starts, cycle guard
Add two tests in workflow_core/src/state.rs: set_task_graph round-trip through save/load, and backwards-compatible deserialization of old state files without task_successors
Add queued_task_polls_before_completing test using DelayedHandle (AtomicUsize counter) that returns is_running()=true for first 2 polls then false, exercising the polling loop
